Headline: Red, Purple, and Brown Line Service Delayed at Belmont
ShortDescription: Red, Purple, and Brown Line trains are standing near Belmont due to signal problems. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red, Purple, and Brown Line trains are standing near Belmont due to signal problems.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:
#81 Lawrence
#78 Montrose
#80 Irving Park
#36 Broadway
#70 Division

Shuttles buses have been requested in both directions for the following:

Brown Line from Kimball to Belmont to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Red/Purple Line from Howard to Belmont to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
